description_long: This is a weathered, vintage-style doll with a pale, almost white complexion and a glossy, glazed finish. The doll has short, painted blue hair and dark, hollow-looking eyes, giving it a haunting appearance. Its body is marked with stains and discolorations, particularly a large brownish patch on the lower torso and smaller red marks on the chest. The doll is dressed in a simple, one-piece outfit that appears to be part of its molded body, with no separate fabric garments. The limbs are rigid and slightly bent, with the right leg partially broken or missing the foot. The overall condition suggests significant wear, possibly from prolonged outdoor exposure or neglect.
description: A worn, pale doll with blue hair, dark eyes, and a stained, glossy body, featuring a broken right foot and visible marks on the torso.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's blue hair, dark eyes, stained torso, and broken right foot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the blue hair, and the bent legs with the broken right foot visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and body, with the blue hair and overall glossy white surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the blue hair, and the bent legs with the left foot intact.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is molded with a one-piece, long-sleeved outfit that is painted white, with no visible patterns or separate garments. The style is utilitarian and plain, reminiscent of early 20th-century porcelain dolls.
attribute_pose: The doll is seated with both legs extended forward, the right leg slightly bent and missing the foot, and the left leg intact. Both arms are relaxed and angled downward at the sides. The head is upright and facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with closed lips, wide dark eyes, and no visible emotion or smile.
attribute_hair_style: Short, painted blue hair with a smooth, slicked-back appearance and no visible parting.
